subject: Add animated number counters on home page and community stats
description: The hero stats on Home ($971K, 4, 86, 4) and Community ($971K, 10.9K) are static text. Add a count-up animation that triggers when the stats scroll into view using IntersectionObserver. Animate from 0 to target over ~1.5s with easing. Small touch but makes the data feel alive and dynamic. No dependencies needed - pure CSS counter or requestAnimationFrame.

changes: Created useCountUp hook (IntersectionObserver + rAF + ease-out cubic)
Applied to 4 HomePage hero stats via CountStat/HeroStats components
Applied to 4 CommunityPage aggregate stats via CommunityCounter components
Special CommunityCounterDonors for decimal K formatting (10.9K)
